title: Tempus AI — deep-dive
question: It's my favorite company; does the thesis survive a hard look?
finding: A differentiated, finally-inflecting precision-medicine business (FY2025 revenue +83% to $1.27bn, adjusted EBITDA crossing zero) with a real-but-narrow data moat (126% net revenue retention, >$1.1bn backlog). Still GAAP-unprofitable, ~6x forward sales, with related-party earnings-quality flags and 30-vote founder control. Own with eyes open, not a clean buy.
author: Hsin Cheng Yeh
